subject: revert(mobile): undo incorrect header/context-bar hiding fixes
body:
Reverts App.jsx and ContextBar.jsx to main branch state. The previous
commits incorrectly hid the header and page management controls when the
bottom sheet was open. The header was never sticky, so hiding it was
wrong. The actual issue is the ordering of ContextBar and Platform Info
Strip in the mobile layout — not visibility toggling.

Tags: mobile, ui, revert
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-layout
Semver: patch
